examples: Referring to his headgear, he said, "I found this Japanese hat.''
Judging by his headgear and telephone, it's most likely the post-revolutionary period.
The traditional headgear of the French farmer, the beret, is now rarely made in France itself.
Her headgear got such "an incredible response" that he decided to make 10 more to sell.
In what could be characterized as revenge of the nerds, Glass makes headgear cool.
